name: pop-stand-out-in-any-crowd
description: Sam Horn's POP! — a personal branding and communication toolkit using Purpose, Originality, and Pizzazz to help professionals get noticed and make a lasting impression in a crowded marketplace.
useCase: Learn how to stand out with purpose, originality, and pizzazz — create your own IP, craft memorable messages, and get noticed.
knownRisks: The framework is high-level — needs personalization to be effective
Not all industries reward standing out — some prefer conformity
